name: deleteRange
description: Deletes content within a specified range (start index inclusive, end index exclusive) from the document or a specific tab.

documentId.description: The ID of the Google Document (from the URL).

startIndex.description: The starting index of the text range (inclusive, starts from 1).

endIndex.description: The ending index of the text range (exclusive).

tabId.description: The ID of the specific tab to delete from. If not specified, deletes from the first tab (or legacy document.body for documents without tabs).
